name: Duos Technologies Group, Inc.
description: Duos Technologies Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, designs, develops, and operates intelligent technology solutions in the United States. The company offers a suite of proprietary software, including the Centraco platform, which integrates and manages various security and operational systems, and the praesidium suite, an image analysis and processing software. It also provides automated inspection systems, such as the Railcar Inspection Portal, which captures high-resolution images of moving trains to detect defects and anomalies. Duos Technologies Group, Inc. serves the rail, transportation, petrochemical, and enterprise sectors.
